title: philadelphus microphyllus var. occidentalis
intro: Philadelphus microphyllus var. occidentalis, also known as the western mayapple, is a species of flowering plant in the honeysuckle family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating skin conditions. Herbal preparations of western mayapple typically involve drying the roots or leaves and using them in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
